mapper.insert: INSERT INTO diagnostic_reports ( user_id, session_id, subject_id, report_type, overall_score, ability_rating, radar_data, weak_points, strengths, suggestions, time_analysis, generated_at ) VALUES ( #{report.userId}, #{report.sessionId}, #{report.subjectId}, #{report.reportType}, #{report.overallScore}, #{report.abilityRating}, #{report.radarData}, #{report.weakPoints}, #{report.strengths}, #{report.suggestions}, #{report.timeAnalysis}, NOW() )
